title: Incyte's (INCY) Pemazyre Gets Approval to Treat MLNs in Japan
text: Incyte (INCY) receives approval for treating myeloid or lymphoid neoplasms using Pemazyre (pemigatinib) in Japan.

title: Incyte Announces Japanese Approval of Pemazyre® (pemigatinib) for the Treatment of Patients with Myeloid/Lymphoid Neoplasms (MLNs)
FDA Rejection Pushes Incyte Stock Sharply Lower
text: The shares of Incyte Corporation   ( NASDAQ:INCY) are down 5.3% at $68.33 at last check, after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) failed to approve the extended-release version of the company's cancer drug Jakafi, which will lose market exclusivity in 2028.

title: Incyte Stock Dives On Surprise Rejection For Updated Jakafi
text: Incyte stock toppled Friday after the FDA unexpectedly rejected an extended-release version of its blockbuster drug, Jakafi. The post Incyte Stock Dives On Surprise Rejection For Updated Jakafi appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Incyte (INCY) Gets CRL for Jakafi Extended-Release Tablets
text: The FDA issues a complete response letter to Incyte's (INCY) extended-release tablet formulation of Jakafi drug for the treatment of myelofibrosis, polycythemia vera and graft-versus-host disease.

title: Incyte Provides Regulatory Update on Ruxolitinib Extended-Release Tablets
text: WILMINGTON, Del.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Incyte (Nasdaq:INCY) today announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has issued a complete response letter for ruxolitinib extended-release (XR) tablets, a JAK1/JAK2 inhibitor, for once-daily (QD) use in the treatment of certain types of myelofibrosis (MF), polycythemia vera (PV) and graft-versus-host disease (GVHD).

title: Incyte (INCY) Receives FDA Approval for Skin Cancer Treatment
text: Incyte (INCY) gets accelerated approval for retifanlimab-dlwr for the treatment of adults with metastatic or recurrent locally advanced merkel cell carcinoma.

title: Incyte Announces FDA Approval of Zynyz™ (retifanlimab-dlwr) for the Treatment of Metastatic or Recurrent Locally Advanced Merkel Cell Carcinoma (MCC)
text: First regulatory approval for Incyte PD-1 inhibitor based on the results of the POD1UM-201 trial

title: 7 Healthcare Stocks to Buy for Long-Term Growth and Stability
text: Stock market investors have been on a rollercoaster ride over the past year. The Federal Reserve continues to be hawkish in controlling inflation.

title: Incyte (INCY) Vitiligo Drug Povorcitinib Positive in Phase II
text: Incyte (INCY) announces positive data on povorcitinib and Opzelura for the treatment of nonsegmental vitiligo.

title: Incyte Announces Data from Phase 2b Study Evaluating Povorcitinib (INCB54707) in Patients with Extensive Nonsegmental Vitiligo
Incyte Announces Long-Term Extension Data from Phase 3 TRuE-V Program Demonstrating Long-Term Safety and Durability of Response of Opzelura® (Ruxolitinib) Cream in Vitiligo
Incyte Announces Data from Across its Oncology Portfolio will be Presented at the AACR Annual Meeting 2023
Incyte (INCY) Discontinues Jakafi Combo Myelofibrosis Study
text: Incyte (INCY) decides to scrap the LIMBER-304 study evaluating the efficacy and safety of parsaclisib plus Jakafi for myelofibrosis (MF) following an independent data monitoring committee recommendation.

title: Caris Life Sciences and Incyte Enter Into Broad Precision Medicine Partnership to Advance Incyte's Oncology Pipeline
text: IRVING, Texas , March 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Caris Life Sciences ®(Caris), the leading molecular science and technology company actively developing and delivering innovative solutions to revolutionize healthcare, today announced a strategic research partnership with Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY) to augment precision medicine approaches for Incyte's oncology pipeline. This partnership with Incyte will leverage Caris' leading molecular science and technology solutions Caris' unique platform combines data from whole exome sequencing, whole transcriptome sequencing, protein analysis, and proprietary AI models and signatures to improve patient outcomes through advancement of personalized medicine.

title: Multiple Abstracts from Incyte's Growing Dermatology Portfolio Featured at American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting
10 S&P 500 Stocks Are Practically Immune To More Fed Rate Hikes
text: Is the Fed done jacking up interest rates or not? Angst over that question is torturing the stock market — but a handful of S&P 500 stocks aren't worried.

title: Incyte Provides Update on Interim Analysis of Phase 3 LIMBER-304 Study of Parsaclisib and Ruxolitinib in Patients with Myelofibrosis
